1.name: Qian

lines.text: All day active, vigilant at night.

1.xiang: 天行健，君子以自强不息。

2.name: Kun

lines.text: Tied sack - no blame, no praise.
Dragons fight - blood black and yellow.

2.xiang: 地势坤，君子以厚德载物。

4.name: Meng
4.xiang: 山下出泉，蒙。君子以果行育德。

5.name: Xu

lines.text: Wait on sand - gossip, final good.

5.xiang: 云上于天，需。君子以饮食宴乐。

6.name: Song
6.xiang: 天与水违行，讼。君子以作事谋始。

7.name: Shi
7.xiang: 地中有水，师。君子以容民畜众。

8.name: Bi
8.xiang: 地上有水，比。先王以建万国，亲诸侯。

9.name: Xiao Chu
9.judgment: Small accum. Dense clouds, no rain.
9.xiang: 风行天上，小畜。君子以懿文德。
9.meaning: Small accum. Dense clouds, no rain.

10.name: Lu
10.judgment: Tread on tiger tail - not bitten.
10.xiang: 上天下泽，履。君子以辨上下，定民志。
10.meaning: Tread on tiger tail - not bitten.

11.name: Tai

lines.text: Rush grass pulled - others follow. Advance.
Embrace all, cross river, no cliques.

11.xiang: 天地交，泰。后以财成天地之道，辅相天地之宜，以左右民。

12.name: Pi

lines.text: Rush grass pulled - others follow. Persevere.
Embrace and endure - petty prosper, great decline.
Standstill ends - great person brings fortune.
Overthrow standstill - first bad, then joy.

12.xiang: 天地不交，否。君子以俭德辟难，不可荣以禄。

13.name: Tong Ren

lines.text: Hide weapons on hill. Three years.
Mount wall - do not attack. Fortune.
Fellowship - first cry, then laugh. Armies meet.

13.xiang: 天与火，同人。君子以类族辨物。

14.name: Da You
14.xiang: 火在天上，大有。君子以遏恶扬善，顺天休命。

15.name: Qian

lines.text: Modesty known - correct your own state.

15.xiang: 地中有山，谦。君子以裒多益寡，称物平施。

16.name: Yu

lines.text: Firm as rock - do not wait.

16.xiang: 雷出地奋，豫。先王以作乐崇德，殷荐之上帝，以配祖考。

17.name: Sui
17.xiang: 泽中有雷，随。君子以向晦入宴息。

18.name: Gu

lines.text: Correct father corruption - son steps forward.

18.xiang: 山下有风，蛊。君子以振民育德。

19.name: Lin
19.xiang: 泽上有地，临。君子以教思无穷，容保民无疆。

20.name: Guan

lines.text: Childlike observation - no blame for small.
Observe your life - advance or retreat.

20.xiang: 风行地上，观。先王以省方观民设教。

21.name: Shi He

lines.text: Bites dried bone - metal arrow. Persevere.

21.xiang: 雷电噬嗑，先王以明罚敕法。

22.name: Bi

lines.text: Grace in garden - small gift, final good.

22.xiang: 山下有火，贲。君子以明庶政，无敢折狱。

23.name: Bo

lines.text: String of fish - gain favor below.
Great fruit uneaten - noble ride, common lose.

23.xiang: 山附于地，剥。上以厚下安宅。

24.name: Fu

lines.text: Return after short stray - great fortune.

24.xiang: 雷在地中，复。先王以至日闭关，商旅不行，后不省方。

25.name: Wu Wang
25.xiang: 天下雷行，物与无妄。先王以茂对时育万物。

26.name: Da Chu
26.xiang: 天在山中，大畜。君子以多识前言往行，以畜其德。

27.name: Yi

lines.text: Leave your tortoise - watch me eat. Misfortune.
Offending nourishment - no good ten years.
Source of nourishment - danger then fortune.

27.xiang: 山下有雷，颐。君子以慎言语，节饮食。

28.name: Da Guo

lines.text: Spread white rushes beneath - no blame.
Withered poplar sprouts - old man, young wife.
Withered poplar flowers - old woman, young man.

28.xiang: 泽灭木，大过。君子以独立不惧，遁世无闷。

29.name: Kan

lines.text: Abyss doubled - fall in pit. Misfortune.
Forward, backward - abyss. Do not act.
Simple offerings from window - final no blame.
Abyss not filled - danger levels out.
Bound in ropes, imprisoned - three years.

29.xiang: 水洊至，习坎。君子以常德行，习教事。

30.name: Li

lines.text: Step carefully - respect brings no blame.
Sunset radiance - sigh at old age. Misfortune.
Sudden arrival - blaze up, die down.
King uses force - behead leader, capture rest.

30.xiang: 明两作，离。大人以继明照于四方。

31.name: Xian

lines.text: Influence in calf - misfortune. Stay - fortune.
Influence in thigh - holding on brings regret.
Influence in cheeks and tongue - chatter.

31.xiang: 山上有泽，咸。君子以虚受人。

32.name: Heng

lines.text: Lasting in virtue - woman good, man dangerous.

32.xiang: 雷风，恒。君子以立不易方。

33.name: Dun
33.xiang: 天下有山，遁。君子以远小人，不恶而严。

34.name: Da Zhuang

lines.text: Petty use strength - ram butting fence.
Lose goat in field - no regret.
Ram stuck - cannot advance or retreat.

34.xiang: 雷在天上，大壮。君子以非礼弗履。

35.name: Jin

lines.text: Advance with horns - attack city. Danger.

35.xiang: 明出地上，晋。君子以自昭明德。

36.name: Ming Yi

lines.text: Wounded left thigh - saved by horse.
Rose to heaven, fell to earth.

36.xiang: 明入地中，明夷。君子以莅众，用晦而明。

37.name: Jia Ren
37.xiang: 风自火出，家人。君子以言有物而行有恒。

38.name: Kui

lines.text: Regret vanishes. Lose horse - do not chase.
Meet lord in alley - no blame.
Cart dragging, ox held - bad start, good end.
Pig in mud, wagon of ghosts - drop bow.

38.xiang: 上火下泽，睽。君子以同而异。

39.name: Jian

lines.text: Official in repeated difficulty - not for self.

39.xiang: 山上有水，蹇。君子以反身修德。

40.name: Jie

lines.text: Capture three foxes - gain yellow arrow.
Carry burdens and ride - invites bandits.
Duke shoots hawk on wall - captures.

40.xiang: 雷雨作，解。君子以赦过宥罪。

41.name: Sun

lines.text: Three walk - lose one. One walks - gain friend.

41.xiang: 山下有泽，损。君子以惩忿窒欲。

42.name: Yi

lines.text: Use fortune for misfortune - no blame. Report.
No help, some attack - unsettled heart.

42.xiang: 风雷，益。君子以见善则迁，有过则改。

43.name: Guai

lines.text: Warning calls - armed guards. Dont worry.
No skin on buttocks - difficult walk.
Decisive as cutting purslane - no blame.

43.xiang: 泽上于天，夬。君子以施禄及下，居德则忌。

44.name: Gou

lines.text: Kitchen fish - no blame. Not for guests.
No skin on buttocks - difficult walk.
No fish in kitchen - starting misfortune.
Wrapped melon in willow - hidden beauty.
Meeting at horns - regret, no blame.

44.xiang: 天下有风，姤。后以施命诰四方。

45.name: Cui

lines.text: Sincere but unfinished - chaos. Shout, unite.

45.xiang: 泽上于地，萃。君子以除戎器，戒不虞。

46.name: Sheng
46.xiang: 地中生木，升。君子以顺德，积小以高大。

47.name: Kun

lines.text: Seated on withered tree - dark valley.
Distressed by food - red robe approaches. Sacrifice.
Distressed by stone, thorns - no wife.
Slow approach - distressed in golden carriage.
Nose and feet cut - slowly freed.
Tangled vines, restless - regret, then fortune.

47.xiang: 泽无水，困。君子以致命遂志。

48.name: Jing
48.judgment: The well. Town changes, well stays.

lines.text: Muddy well - no one drinks. Old well - no birds.
Well pool shoots fish - jar broken.
Well clean but not drunk - heart aches.
Clear well - cold spring water drunk.
Well open, no cover - great fortune.

48.xiang: 木上有水，井。君子以劳民劝相。
48.meaning: The well. Town changes, well stays.

49.name: Ge

lines.text: Wrapped in oxhide - cannot change yet.
After the day, change - advance, fortune.
Advance - misfortune. Discuss change three times.
Great person changes like a tiger.

49.xiang: 泽中有火，革。君子以治历明时。

50.name: Ding

lines.text: Cauldron handle lost - good food uneaten.
Cauldron breaks legs - food spills. Misfortune.

50.xiang: 木上有火，鼎。君子以正位凝命。

51.name: Zhen

lines.text: Shock - danger. Lose valuables - they return.
Shock sinks in mud - no blame.
Shock comes and goes - danger but no loss.

51.xiang: 洊雷，震。君子以恐惧修省。

52.name: Gen

lines.text: Stillness in calves - cannot help. Unhappy.
Stillness in waist - tears the back.

52.xiang: 兼山，艮。君子以思不出其位。

53.name: Jian

lines.text: Geese approach shore - young in danger.
Geese approach hill - three years no pregnancy.
Geese approach heights - feathers as ornaments.

53.xiang: 山上有木，渐。君子以居贤德善俗。

54.name: Gui Mei

lines.text: Marry as sister - cripple can walk. Fortune.
Marry as handmaid - return as wife. Wait.
Delayed marriage - waiting for right time.
Empty basket, bleeding sheep - nothing good.

54.xiang: 泽上有雷，归妹。君子以永终知敝。

55.name: Feng

lines.text: Meet equal lord - ten days, no blame.
Abundance darkened - break arm, no blame.
Abundant house, empty - three years, misfortune.

55.xiang: 雷电皆至，丰。君子以折狱致刑。

56.name: Lu

lines.text: Shoot pheasant - lose arrow, final praise.
Bird burns nest - first laugh, then weep. Misfortune.

56.xiang: 山上有火，旅。君子以明慎用刑而不留狱。

57.name: Xun

lines.text: Prostrate beneath bed - shaman ritual. Fortune.
Regret vanishes - three kinds of game.
Prostrate beneath bed - lose wealth. Danger.

57.xiang: 随风，巽。君子以申命行事。

58.name: Dui

lines.text: Joyous negotiation unsettled - illness brings joy.

58.xiang: 丽泽，兑。君子以朋友讲习。

59.name: Huan

lines.text: Swift rescue with strong horse - fortune.
Scattered - hasten to the stand. Regret gone.
Scattering the great - sweat the proclamation.
Scattering blood - depart far. No blame.

59.xiang: 风行水上，涣。先王以享于帝立庙。

60.name: Jie
60.xiang: 泽上有水，节。君子以制数度，议德行。

61.name: Zhong Fu

lines.text: Crying crane in shade - young answers.
Meeting rival - drum then stop, weep then sing.
Moon nearly full - horse vanishes. No blame.

61.xiang: 泽上有风，中孚。君子以议狱缓死。

62.name: Xiao Guo

lines.text: Dense clouds, no rain - duke shoots.
No meeting - excessive. Flying bird trapped.

62.xiang: 山上有雷，小过。君子以行过乎恭，丧过乎哀，用过乎俭。

63.name: Ji Ji

lines.text: Drag wheels - wet tail. No blame.
Woman loses curtain - returns in seven days.
King attacks demon country - three years.
Fine clothes become rags - careful all day.

63.xiang: 水在火上，既济。君子以思患而豫防之。

64.name: Wei Ji

lines.text: Sincere feasting - no blame. Wetting head loses all.

64.xiang: 火在水上，未济。君子以慎辨物居方。
